title: Private-Sector Bank Deposits by Type (Sight/Saving/Time), FY1963/64-1969/70

citations.source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank), companion table to Table 6.1 'Monetary Survey' in the same report section, both ultimately sourced from Bank Markazi Iran (Central Bank of Iran) data
